problem id: c728dd09
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  10101011 -> 01100001
  01000011 -> 01100000
  11110101 -> 10100001
  00011011 -> 01100000
  11001110 -> 11000001
  00100101 -> 10100000
  10111110 -> 11000001
  10011100 -> 10000001

query: 11001101
predicted answer: 10100001
